overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a tropical canyon toward a coastal pier. The character traverses rocky paths, passes campfires and NPCs, and walks along a wooden dock extending over the ocean toward a large rock arch formation.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon trail with tropical palm trees

events.description: path widens and sky becomes visible as canyon opens up toward the coast

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rocky canyon path lined with palm trees

notable_agents.action: small orange cat-like creature walking across the stone path

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock wall forming the left side of the canyon
tall reddish-brown rock wall forming the right side of the canyon
tall tropical palm trees lining both sides of the canyon path
uneven stone and dirt trail winding through the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with steep reddish cliffs on both sides. Tall palm trees line the path, creating partial shade. A small orange creature briefly crosses the path ahead as the canyon gradually opens up toward the coast.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with campfires and ocean view

events.description: exits canyon into open coastal area with full ocean view and bright sunlight
moving into direct sunlight near the campfire, shadows become more defined

agents.ego_description: approaching the coastal camp area with wooden platforms and burning campfires

notable_agents.action: villager NPC standing near supplies and campfire

entered.detail: vast blue ocean visible beyond the coastal cliff edge
burning campfire with orange flames and stone ring
stacked wooden barrels near the supply area
wooden crates and supplies stacked near the campfire

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the scene opens to a bright coastal overlook with the ocean visible in the distance. The character passes a green canvas tent and approaches a campfire area with wooden barrels and supply crates. A villager NPC stands near the supplies as the lighting shifts to direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing pier extending over tropical ocean

events.description: steps onto wooden pier extending over the ocean water
slight turn to the right while walking along the pier toward the rock arch

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden pier toward the large rock arch formation

notable_agents.action: fisher NPC standing at pier edge with fishing rod over the water

entered.detail: massive reddish rock formation with natural archway tunnel
weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway over water
small wooden boats floating in the water beside the pier

segments.scene_description: The character walks onto a wooden pier extending over the bright blue ocean. The massive rock arch formation dominates the horizon ahead. A fisher NPC stands at the pier's edge casting a line. The wooden planks show signs of weathering as waves lap against the pilings below.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of pier with docked boats and rock arch backdrop

events.description: slows and stops near the NPC at the end of the pier

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the pier and approaching an NPC near the docked boats

notable_agents.action: NPC in purple clothing standing at pier end near wooden boats

entered.detail: two wooden boats with lanterns docked at the pier end
yellow glowing lantern hanging from the boat

segments.scene_description: At the end of the pier, the character approaches an NPC dressed in purple standing near two docked wooden boats. The massive rock arch now looms to the right, framing the ocean view. Yellow lanterns glow softly on the boats as the character comes to a stop at the pier's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a narrow rocky canyon out toward a bright, expansive coastal pier. It begins between steep reddish cliffs and shading palm trees, passing a small orange creature as the path gradually opens toward the coast. As the character emerges from the canyon, the scene shifts into direct sunlight at a coastal overlook, moving past a green canvas tent and a villager stationed near a campfire and supply crates. The camera then follows the character onto a weathered wooden pier extending over the bright blue ocean, passing a fisher casting a line while a massive rock arch dominates the horizon. Finally, the movement concludes at the pier's end near two docked boats with glowing yellow lanterns, where the towering rock arch frames the ocean view.
